SEARCH
Package ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.board

Class Board

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.board.Board
public class Board extends Object
represents the dungeon board as a 2D grid of Cell more specifically: store the dungeon as a full Cell[][] grid providing getCell(x,y) and setCell(x, y, cell)

coordinates are in cell units (not pixels!): x = coloumn, y = row

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Board(Cell[][] grid)
    creates a new board with the given grid

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board(Cell[][] grid)
      creates a new board with the given grid

      important: this grid should contain a cell at every coordinate, no null entries

      Parameters:
      grid - rectangular non empty grid of cells
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if grid is null, empty, not rectangle shaped or contains null rows/cells

  • Method Details

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth()
      Returns:
      width aka the number of coloumns

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Returns:
      height aka the number of rows

    • isInside

      public boolean isInside(Position position)
      Returns:
      returns if a given position is inside the board

    • getGrid

      public Cell[][] getGrid()
      Returns:
      returns the grid

    • getStartPosition

      public Position getStartPosition()
      Returns:
      start position defined by the map

    • setStartPosition

      public void setStartPosition(Position startPosition)
      sets the start position
      Parameters:
      startPosition - start position
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if null or out of bounds
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is outside the board

    • getEndPosition

      public Position getEndPosition()
      Returns:
      end/exit position defined by the map

    • setEndPosition

      public void setEndPosition(Position endPosition)
      sets the end/exit position
      Parameters:
      endPosition - exit tile coordinate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if null or out of bounds
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is outside the board

    • getCell

      public Cell getCell(int x, int y)
      returns the cell at (x,y)
      Parameters:
      x - column index
      y - row index
      Returns:
      the cell at that coordinate
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if out of bounds

    • setCell

      public void setCell(int x, int y, Cell cell)
      replaces the cell at (x,y)

      one use case would be: whena RewardCell is collected, replace it with a FloorCell

      Parameters:
      x - x coloumn index
      y - row index
      cell - new cell (must not be null)
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if out of bounds
      IllegalArgumentException - if cell is null
